stemHtml: A pilot faces a fuel emergency caused by incorrect flight planning and needs to divert to the closest suitable airport. The shortest route passes through a restricted area. May the pilot enter the restricted airspace under these circumstances?

options.a: No — since the emergency resulted from pilot error, entry into restricted airspace is not permitted.
options.b: Yes — in an emergency the pilot may enter the restricted area and should notify ATC to clear the airspace.
options.c: Yes — the pilot may enter the restricted area with no obligation to inform ATC.
options.d: No — the pilot must land outside the restricted area regardless of the situation.
